text: CENTCOM blockade enforcement begins at 10:00 AM ET. USS Ford and Lincoln CSGs with 6 destroyers now positioned to interdict ALL vessels entering/exiting Iranian ports. IRGC responded with 'deadly vortex' video — crosshairs on naval vessels. This is a dual-blockade standoff: Iran mines + US warships. Neither side backing down.
verificationNote: Stars and Stripes, Naval News, CENTCOM official statement confirmed blockade start.

text: Oil surging on blockade: Brent $102.29 (+7.4%), WTI $104.56 (+9.5%). Back above $100 for first time since ceasefire crash. Wholesale gas +6%, European gas +18%. 2,800 ships stranded. 3 VLCCs that exited yesterday (~6M bbl) were the last commercial oil movement before blockade enforcement began. Goldman $100+ vindicated.
verificationNote: CNBC, Axios, Investing.com confirmed oil surge. Bloomberg confirmed tanker U-turns.

text: IDF hospital raid in Bint Jbeil — 98th Division + Golani entered eastern districts, Givati raids Governmental Hospital. ~20 Hezbollah killed inside, ~20 more in vicinity. Weapons cache seized. All roads to city cut off. Netanyahu visited troops, officially named it 'Operation Silver Plow.' Hezbollah Radwan units still resisting.
verificationNote: Times of Israel, Jerusalem Post confirmed hospital raid. JPost confirmed Netanyahu visit and Silver Plow naming.

text: Intel leak blows up Hegseth 'depleted and decimated' claim. US intelligence shows Iran still holds 1,000+ medium-range missiles from pre-war ~2,500 stockpile. More than half of launchers damaged/trapped but significant portion recoverable. This changes the strategic calculus — Iran is NOT out of missiles.
verificationNote: The Daily Beast confirmed intel leak. WSJ original reporting.

text: Red Cross paramedic Hassan Badawi killed by Israeli drone in Beit Yahoun. UNIFIL reports IDF tank rammed UN vehicles TWICE near Bayada. IDF also spray-painted UNIFIL HQ windows to deny visibility. 5 killed in Qana airstrike including 3 women. Lebanon now at 2,055 dead. The humanitarian situation is deteriorating rapidly.
verificationNote: Turkiye Today, QNA confirmed Red Cross strike. Middle East Eye, Arab News confirmed UNIFIL ramming. BSSNEWS confirmed Qana.

text: Day 45 AM roundup: CENTCOM blockade begins 10am ET. Oil above $100 (Brent $102.29, WTI $104.56). IDF storms Bint Jbeil hospital (~40 Hezbollah killed). Red Cross paramedic killed. text: Markets reacting to blockade: Brent $102.51 (+7.3%), WTI $104.82 (+8.5%). Dow futures -517pts. Asian markets: Nikkei -1.09%, Hang Seng -1.22%. text: BINT JBEIL FALLING: IDF 98th Division + Givati encircle city. Hospital raid: ~40 Hezbollah killed, weapons cache seized. Nasrallah's 2000 victory speech stadium captured. text: France and UK announce RIVAL Hormuz conference — 'peaceful multinational mission' to restore free transit. Separate from US blockade. Starmer explicitly rejects joining Trump. Macron: 'strictly defensive.' This splits the Western response: US blockade on one side, European freedom-of-navigation on the other. Iran watching closely. Two competing international frameworks for same waterway.
verificationNote: Bloomberg, Al Jazeera confirmed France-UK conference and Starmer rejection.

text: Trump on Fox News: outlines 5-point nuclear demands. (1) Dismantle enrichment, (2) Hand over 400+ kg uranium, (3) Accept security framework, (4) Stop funding proxies, (5) Open Hormuz no tolls.
